examples: He spends every evening drinking in the pub with his crony.
They understand that they are not their child's friend, buddy, peer, comrade, or crony.
After he had flopped down on Seven's left, his crony without a word lay down on her right.
It was Balkan-style crony capitalism, creating far too cosy a relationship between politics and big business.
They will spend millions of dollars to try to perpetuate their brand of crony capitalism.
